steps.title: Apply the rectangle area formula
steps.content: For a rectangle, Area = width times length. The given area $A = w(w+7)$ is already factored as a product of two terms.

steps.title: Identify the length
steps.content: Since Area = width times length and we're given $A = w(w+7)$ with width = $w$, the remaining factor must be the length. Therefore, length = $(w+7)$. D is correct.
